title: melanthium parviflorum
intro: Melanthium parviflorum, also known as the lesser melanth, is a perennial plant species in the Melanthiaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, as it contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-spasmodic properties. Melanthium parviflorum is typically prepared as a decoction or tea, and in some cases, it is also used in tincture or extract form to harness its medicinal benefits.
